caption: The video appears to be a medical simulation or educational content, likely focusing on ultrasound imaging. The screen displays an ultrasound image with two distinct circular structures, possibly representing anatomical features such as eyes or other organs. The date and time on the screen indicate that this is part of a recorded session from February 14, 2023, at 9:41 AM. Various settings and parameters are visible on the right side of the screen, including MI (Mechanical Index) and TIS (Thermal Index for Soft tissue), which are important for ensuring patient safety during the ultrasound procedure. The text "Day 2" and "Sim Week" suggest that this is part of a multi-day simulation week, possibly aimed at training healthcare professionals. The presence of a silhouette of an elderly person with a cane might imply that the simulation involves geriatric care or related scenarios.
